meaning: n.被告adj.辩护的,为自己辩护的
examples: The jury found for the defendant.
The defendant pleaded guilty and was fined $500.
The defendant drove negligently and hit a lamp post.
The defendant clapped his hands in delight as the translator relayed to him the verdict.
Zervakos said the 32-year-old defendant simply did not fit his image of a murderer.
